archive_data.question_text: In which year did Anil Kumble take 10 wickets in a cricket test match?

explanation.english: Anil Kumble took 10 wickets in a single innings against Pakistan in a Test match held in Delhi in the year 1999.
explanation.tanglish: Anil Kumble 1999-aam aandu Delhi-le Pakistan-ku edhirana test match-il oru innings-il 10 wickets eduthar.

archive_data.question_text: In which city of Maharashtra is Kalidasa Festival organised every year?

explanation.english: The Kalidasa Festival is organised every year in Nagpur city of Maharashtra to honour the classical Sanskrit scholar Kalidasa.
explanation.tanglish: Maharashtra state-le Nagpur city-le thaan varushathukku varusham Kalidasa Festival nadatthappadugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: As per Article 170 of the Constitution of India, the Legislative Assembly of each State shall consist of NOT more than __________ members.

explanation.english: Article 170 of the Indian Constitution stipulates that the Legislative Assembly of each State shall consist of not more than 500 members.
explanation.tanglish: India arasiyalamaippil Article 170 prakaram, oru State Legislative Assembly-il 500 members-kku mela irukka koodaadhu.

archive_data.question_text: Who appoints the Attorney-General of India?

explanation.english: The President of India appoints the Attorney-General of India under Article 76 of the Constitution.
explanation.tanglish: India President thaan Attorney General-aaga Article 76 prakaram niruthugiraar.

archive_data.question_text: Which Indian cricketer has written the book 'The Test of My Life'?

explanation.english: Yuvraj Singh wrote the autobiography 'The Test of My Life' which describes his battle with cancer and his return to cricket.
explanation.tanglish: Yuvraj Singh than 'The Test of My Life' endra autobiography-yai ezhuthinaar, idhu avaroda cancer anaippum cricket-kku thirumbuvathum patriya kadhai.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is a negative impact of globalisation on Indian economy?

options.text: Rise of straight-jacketed approach to leadership styles
Rise in female participation in employment

explanation.english: Globalisation can lead to rise in relative deprivation where certain sections feel economically disadvantaged compared to others, which is considered a negative impact.
explanation.tanglish: Globalization naala ethanai perukku sambalam kammi-athaal avanga deprived-a feel pannuvaanga, ithu than negative impact.

archive_data.question_text: According to the National Jute Board 2022-23, which state is the largest producer of jute?

explanation.english: West Bengal is the largest producer of jute in India, accounting for the majority of the country's jute production.
explanation.tanglish: India-vil West Bengal thaan jute (saanal) utpaddiruppaathil muthal idathila irukkirathu.
